prompt: Create a quarterly financial analysis report for a mid-size technology company. Include revenue trend analysis, expense breakdown by category, key financial ratios (current ratio, debt-to-equity, profit margin), and a 3-month forecast based on current trends. Present findings in a clear executive summary format.

Develop a supplier evaluation matrix for raw materials procurement. Compare 5 potential suppliers across: price competitiveness, delivery reliability, quality certifications, minimum order quantities, and payment terms. Provide a weighted scoring recommendation with justification.

Write a technical specification document for migrating an on-premises PostgreSQL database to a cloud-managed service. Cover: data migration strategy, downtime estimation, rollback plan, security considerations, cost comparison (current vs cloud), and a phased implementation timeline.

Draft a compliance checklist for anti-money laundering (AML) regulations applicable to a fintech startup processing payments. Include: customer due diligence requirements, transaction monitoring thresholds, suspicious activity reporting procedures, record-keeping obligations, and staff training requirements.

Create a patient flow optimization plan for a busy urgent care clinic experiencing 45-minute average wait times. Analyze bottlenecks, propose staffing adjustments, suggest triage improvements, and design a KPI dashboard to track wait times, patient satisfaction, and staff utilization.

Develop a records management policy for a local government agency transitioning from paper to digital. Address: document classification taxonomy, retention schedules by record type, access controls and permissions, scanning and digitization procedures, and disaster recovery for digital archives.

Create a comprehensive FAQ and troubleshooting guide for an e-commerce platform's return and exchange process. Cover: eligibility criteria, step-by-step return instructions, refund timelines, exchange procedures, damaged item claims, and international return policies. Write in clear, customer-friendly language.

Conduct a competitive analysis of the top 5 project management SaaS tools (Asana, Monday.com, ClickUp, Notion, Linear). Compare: pricing tiers, key features, target audience, user reviews sentiment, market positioning, and recent product updates. Identify market gaps and opportunities.

Prepare a detailed cost estimate for a 2,500 sq ft commercial office renovation. Include: demolition, electrical upgrades, HVAC modifications, flooring, painting, furniture, IT infrastructure, permits, and a 15% contingency. Break down by labor, materials, and subcontractor costs.

Design a 4-week onboarding training program for new software engineers at a mid-size company. Include: week-by-week curriculum, hands-on exercises, mentorship pairing guidelines, assessment criteria, tool setup checklists, and a feedback collection mechanism. Balance technical skills with company culture orientation.

Build a 12-month cash flow projection model for a Series A startup with $3M in funding. Account for: monthly burn rate, revenue ramp assumptions, hiring plan costs, marketing spend, infrastructure costs, and runway calculations under conservative, base, and optimistic scenarios.

Write a strategic recommendation memo for a retail chain considering expansion into e-commerce. Address: market opportunity sizing, build vs buy vs partner options, required technology stack, organizational changes needed, estimated timeline and investment, and risk factors with mitigation strategies.

Create an annual operating budget for a 50-unit residential apartment complex. Include: rental income projections, vacancy allowance, maintenance reserves, property tax estimates, insurance costs, utility expenses, management fees, and capital expenditure planning for major repairs.

Develop a sales territory realignment plan for a B2B distribution company expanding from 3 to 5 sales regions. Include: territory boundary definitions based on customer density, revenue potential analysis per territory, quota setting methodology, transition timeline, and impact assessment on existing customer relationships.

Design an inventory optimization strategy for a warehouse handling 10,000 SKUs. Address: ABC analysis classification, reorder point calculations, safety stock formulas, demand forecasting methodology, slow-moving inventory disposition, and KPIs for measuring inventory health.

Write a technical design document for implementing a rate-limiting service using a token bucket algorithm. Include: API interface design, storage backend options (Redis vs in-memory), distributed rate limiting considerations, configuration schema, monitoring and alerting, and example usage code.

Create an employee performance review template and process guide. Include: self-assessment section, manager evaluation criteria, 360-degree feedback mechanism, goal-setting framework (OKRs), rating scale with behavioral anchors, calibration meeting guidelines, and a development plan template.

Develop a HIPAA compliance audit checklist for a small medical practice transitioning to a new EHR system. Cover: access controls, audit logging, data encryption requirements, business associate agreements, breach notification procedures, staff training documentation, and physical security measures.

Write a Python script that analyzes a CSV dataset of customer transactions and produces: monthly revenue trends, customer segmentation by purchase frequency, average order value by segment, churn prediction indicators, and a summary visualization. Include sample data generation and clear documentation.

Create a standard operating procedure (SOP) for a quality control inspection process on an electronics assembly line. Include: inspection checkpoints, acceptance criteria, defect classification (critical/major/minor), sampling methodology, documentation requirements, escalation procedures, and corrective action workflow.

Prepare an internal audit work program for accounts payable. Include: audit objectives, scope definition, risk assessment matrix, detailed testing procedures for each control point, sample size determination, documentation requirements, and reporting template.

Write API documentation for a RESTful payment processing service. Cover: authentication (API keys and OAuth), endpoint reference (create payment, refund, list transactions, webhooks), request/response schemas with examples, error codes, rate limits, and a getting-started quickstart guide.

Create a database performance tuning report for a PostgreSQL instance experiencing slow query times. Include: identification of top 10 slow queries with execution plans, index recommendations, configuration parameter adjustments, connection pool optimization, vacuum and maintenance scheduling, and monitoring setup.

Prepare a month-end closing checklist and procedures guide for a SaaS company using accrual accounting. Include: revenue recognition steps (ASC 606), expense accruals, prepaid amortization, bank reconciliation, intercompany eliminations, journal entry templates, and review signoff workflow.

Develop a go-to-market launch plan for a new B2B SaaS product targeting mid-market companies. Include: target persona definition, positioning and messaging framework, channel strategy (content, paid, partnerships), launch timeline (pre-launch, launch day, post-launch), success metrics, and budget allocation across channels.
